**FIX:** 
To fix this issue, it is likely necessary to update or patch the HPAudioAnalyticClientLib.dll driver or library to resolve the breakpoint exception.

**Type:** ETL Processing Issue
**Cause:** The ETL process is stuck in an infinite loop, repeatedly reading from or writing to the same source or target system.
